description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn base. The structure features a simple, elongated form with a moderately pitched gable roof in a light gray color. The exterior walls are finished in a light tone, likely painted siding or stucco, and several windows are distributed along the longer sides, providing natural light to the interior. A covered porch area is visible at one end, supported by posts and partially enclosed, offering a sheltered outdoor space. The windows and doors are arranged asymmetrically, with the main entrance likely located at the porch. The overall design is functional and modest, typical of suburban or neighborhood settings.
description: A single-story rectangular bungalow with a light gray gable roof, light exterior walls, and a covered porch at one end, set on a green lawn. Windows are asymmetrically arranged along the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing three windows and the long, light-colored wall with the gable roof above.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the covered porch area, a single window, and the entrance under the roof extension.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two windows and the porch visible at the far end, showing the building's length.
description_view_3: Rear end view with a small window and the back of the porch, emphasizing the building's rectangular shape.
